data.title: XTI Aerospace Shares Are Surging Today: What You Need To Know
data.description: Shares of XTI Aerospace, Inc. (NASDAQ: XTIA) are trading higher Friday potentially from continued momentum after the company announced a significant stock offering on Wednesday.

data.description: Shares of social media companies Snap, Trump Media & Technology and Meta Platforms are trading higher as the U.S. Supreme Court hears oral arguments in the case regarding the potential ban of TikTok.

data.title: Bitcoin Takes 'Stairs Up' And 'Elevator Down' On Labor Market Data: What's Next?
data.description: Unexpectedly strong labour market data has sparked a bearish response in crypto markets, with Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) teetering around the $94,000 mark.
